svg.title: iSputnik Home SQLite Database Diagram
svg.desc: Entity relationship diagram generated from apps/server/src/db.ts. Solid lines are SQLite foreign keys; dashed lines are logical or polymorphic references.
svg.text: Current schema from apps/server/src/db.ts. PK/UQ/FK markers are shown in each table.

Notes: taggables.entity_id, collection_items.entity_id, shares.resource_id, share_links.resource_id, libraries.owner_id, and books.series_id are logical/polymorphic links rather than enforced SQLite foreign keys.
